Official Motto

Great Alliances Build Kingdoms.
Legendary Alliances Build Communities.

quickstart.html:
Quick Start Guide

Core Values

Activity, teamwork, respect, and growth.

Member Expectations

Stay active, participate in events, contribute to Alliance Technology, and support fellow members.

Alliance Technology

Contribute whenever possible. Collective contributions strengthen the whole alliance.

Growth Priorities

Keep construction, research, troop training, gathering, and event participation active.

Promotions

Earned through activity, consistency, event participation, contributions, and teamwork.

Inactivity Policy

2 days offline may trigger a reminder. More than 3 days offline may lead to removal unless leadership was notified.
quickstart.plain: quick start activity alliance technology growth promotions inactivity

glossary.html:
Kingshot Glossary

Alliance

A group of players working together toward common goals.

Alliance Technology

A system where members contribute resources to unlock alliance-wide bonuses.

Rally

A coordinated group attack led by one player and joined by others.

Rally Leader

The player who starts a rally.

Joiner

A player who joins another player’s rally.

Reinforcement

Troops sent to support a city or structure.

Garrison

Troops stationed to defend a structure.

Formation

The composition of troops used in battle.

March

An army sent on a mission.

Buff

A positive effect that improves performance.

Debuff

A negative effect applied to an opponent.

F2P

Free-to-Play player.

P2W

Pay-to-Win player.

Speedups

Items that reduce construction, research, or training time.

Gems

Premium currency used for special purchases and upgrades.

VIP

A progression system that unlocks additional benefits.

Power

A numerical representation of account strength.

Bear Hunt

Alliance event focused on maximizing damage through coordinated rallies.

Alliance Mobilization

Mission-based alliance event.

Sanctuary

Territory-control event.

Sunfire Castle

Major kingdom-control event.

SvS

State versus State competition.

R4

Alliance Officer.

R5

Alliance Leader.
glossary.plain: glossary rally f2p svs bear hunt r4 r5

advanced.html:
Advanced Alliance Manual

Advanced Growth Strategy

Save resources and speedups for important events. Consistency beats short bursts of growth.

Resource Management

Use the 70/20/10 principle: 70% growth, 20% events, 10% emergency reserve.

Hero Development

Focus on a core group of heroes instead of upgrading every hero equally.

Rally Guide

Rally leaders should use strong heroes and formations. Participants should join quickly with strong troops.

Bear Hunt

Be online early, heal troops, prepare marches, join rallies immediately, and avoid gathering during the event.

Leadership

Good leaders communicate, recruit, organize events, resolve conflicts, and develop members.
advanced.plain: advanced manual resource hero rally bear hunt leadership

academy.html:
Kingshot Academy

Beginner Path

First 24 hours, first 3 days, first week, construction, research, heroes, troops, resources, mistakes, and competitive play.

F2P Academy

Gem management, speedup strategy, resource discipline, and long-term efficient growth.

Rally Academy

Rally mechanics, rally leader roles, joiner roles, troop management, and rally discipline.

Bear Hunt Academy

Preparation, rally leaders, rally participants, common mistakes, and advanced coordination.

Leadership Academy

Recruitment, communication, event organization, conflict resolution, member development, and promotion framework.
academy.plain: academy beginner f2p rally bear hunt leadership

events.html:
Event Encyclopedia

Bear Hunt

Maximize alliance damage through coordinated rallies and fast participation.

Alliance Mobilization

Complete missions that match your normal progression plan.

Sanctuary

Capture and defend strategic structures through coordination.

Sunfire Castle

Control the central castle. Organization beats raw power.

State vs State

Save speedups, resources, gems, and teleports during preparation. Follow objectives during war.
events.plain: events bear hunt mobilization sanctuary sunfire castle svs

officer.html:
Officer Handbook

Communication

Share information clearly, answer questions, and promote positive interaction.

Recruitment

Recruit active, reliable, cooperative players with growth potential.

Member Monitoring

Track activity, event participation, contributions, and communication.

Promotions

Evaluate consistency, participation, contribution, and leadership potential.

Inactivity Management

2 days offline: reminder. 3+ days offline: review. Extended absence: removal unless communicated.

Officer Code

Lead by example. Be fair. Be consistent. Be respectful. Protect alliance culture.

faq.html:
Frequently Asked Questions

What should I build first?

Prioritize Headquarters, Research Buildings, and Training Buildings.

Should I spend gems immediately?

No. Save gems for high-value upgrades and long-term progression.

Is Power the most important stat?

No. Activity, efficiency, and event participation often matter more.

Why join an active alliance?

Active alliances provide faster growth, more rewards, and access to important events.

How do promotions work?

Promotions are based on activity, participation, contribution, and reliability.

Can I be removed for inactivity?

Yes. Long inactivity without notice may result in removal.

Why is Alliance Technology important?

It benefits every member and improves alliance performance.

Should I save speedups?

Yes. Speedups are often more valuable during major events.
faq.plain: faq questions build gems power alliance promotions

templates.html:
Alliance Templates

Welcome Message

Welcome to the Alliance. We are committed to creating an active, respectful, and cooperative community. Please review the Quick Start Guide and Alliance Rules.

Recruitment Message

Active alliance recruiting. Requirements: daily activity, event participation, and team-oriented mindset. We value cooperation more than raw power.

Event Reminder

Event starts in 30 minutes. Heal troops, prepare marches, check formations, and be online before start time.

Promotion Announcement

Congratulations. Your activity, contributions, and commitment have earned you a promotion.

Inactivity Warning

Our records indicate recent inactivity. Please contact leadership if you require time away.
templates.plain: templates welcome recruitment reminder promotion inactivity
